post.description: Initiates an on-demand backup for a NAS backupset.

parameters.description: Specify the authorization information in the format: 'pType=org;pID=orgID', where orgID is the ID of your organization. Get the ID of an organization using the 'List all organizations' API.
parameters.name: authentities

parameters.name: jobID

APIError.description: APIError defines an application error result format

CreateBackupResponse.description: CreateResponse is response schema for Create Request

CreateBackupTriggerArgs.description: CreateBackupTriggerArgs bundles all job creation params in single data type.

backupsetID.description: Specify the ID of the backup set. Get the ID using the 'List backup sets' API.

CreateRestoreResponse.description: CreateResponse is response schema for Create Request

CreateRestoreTriggerArgs.description: CreateRestoreTriggerArgs bundles all job creation params in single data type.

backupsetID.description: Specify the ID of the backup set. Get the ID using the 'List backup sets' API.

snapshotID.description: Specify the ID of the snapshot. Get the ID using the 'List Snapshots' API.

snapshotName.description: Specify the name of the snapshot. Get the name using 'List Snapshots' API.

sourceList.description: Specify the list of selected files or folders to restore. Get the list using 'List RP directory' API.

JSONMap.description: Returns the data for the current job.

Job.description: Job defines the schema for a job

actualErrorCode.description: Actual error code for failed jobs.

createdTS.description: Timestamp in seconds when job is created.

endedTS.description: Timestamp in seconds when job is ended.

entityID.description: The ID of the backup set.

entityName.description: The name of the backup set.

entityType.description: The type of the backup set.

errorCategory.description: Category of error for failed jobs.

extendedParams.description: Additional parameters required for job execution.

jobID.description: A unique identification number associated with the job.

primaryAuthEntityID.description: Primary authorization entity ID. Value is ID of your organization.

primaryAuthEntityType.description: Type of primary authorization entity ID. The value is 'org'.

productCustomerID.description: Customer ID specific to the product.

productID.description: Phoenix product ID. The value is 12289.

resourceID.description: The share ID of the backup set.

resourceName.description: The share name of the backup set.

resourceType.description: Type of the resource. The value is 'NASShare'.

retryEnabled.description: Indicates if retry is enabled. The value is 'true' if retry is enabled.

retryWaitinterval.description: Retry interval in minutes before next retry attempt.

scheduleEventID.description: Schedule event ID for scheduled jobs.

secondaryAuthEntityID.description: Secondary authorization entity ID. The value is ID of your group.

secondaryAuthEntityType.description: Type of secondary authorization entity ID. The value is 'group'.

stateID.description: ID of the current state of the job.

stateLabel.description: Label of current state of the job.

targetID.description: Pool ID of the backup set.

targetName.description: Pool name of the backup set.

targetType.description: Type of the target. The value is 'NASPool'.

windowEndTS.description: Duration in seconds for which the backup job runs.

workloadName.description: Name of the workload. The value is 'nas'.

JobParams.description: Specify job parameters needed for restoring snapshot.

destinationFqdn.description: Specify the destination FQDN where the data will be restored.

destinationPath.description: Specify the destination path where the data will be restored.

destinationShare.description: Specify the destination share where the data will be restored.

destinationShareID.description: Specify destination share ID for which the data will be restored.

deviceID.description: Specify destination NAS device ID where the data will be restored.

fileHandlingOption.description: Spceify file handling option. Enter '1' to Always overwrite, '2' to Always skip, '3' to Restore and move original to location, and '4' to Overwrite if original file is older.

originalLocationRestore.description: Specify restore location. Set the value to 'true' for origial location restore, else set it to 'false' for alternate location restore.

preserveOriginalDirectoryStructure.description: Specify directory structure. Set the value to 'true' to preserve original directory structure in case of alternate restore, else set it to 'false'.

snapshotState.description: Specify state of the snapshot. For example, 'hot', 'warm' or 'cold'.

RWCConfig.description: Specify parameters related to restore with confidence.

continueIrrespectiveOfSnapshotState.description: Specify if the user wants to skip restore with confidence for 'hot' and 'cold' snapshot state. Set the value to 'true' to skip restore with confidence for 'hot' and 'cold' snapshot state. The default value is false.

doRWC.description: Specify whether the user wants to perform restore with confidence. Set the value to 'true' to perform restore with confidence, else set it to 'false'.

CreateBackupResponseAzureSQL.description: CreateResponse is response schema for Create Request

CreateBackupTriggerArgsAzureSQL.description: CreateBackupTriggerArgs bundles all job creation params in single data type.

backupsetID.description: Specify the ID of the backup set. Get the ID using the 'List backup sets' API.

CreateRestoreResponseAzureSQL.description: CreateResponse is response schema for Create Request

CreateRestoreTriggerArgsAzureSQL.description: CreateRestoreTriggerArgs bundles all job creation params in single data type.

backupsetID.description: Specify the ID of the backup set. Get the ID using the 'List backup sets' API.

snapshotID.description: Specify the ID of the snapshot. Get the ID using the "List Snapshots" API.

snapshotName.description: Specify the name of the snapshot. Get the name using "List Snapshots" API.

actualErrorCode.description: Actual error code for failed jobs.

createdTS.description: Timestamp in seconds when job is created.

endedTS.description: Timestamp in seconds when job is ended.

entityID.description: The ID of the backup set.

entityName.description: The name of the backup set.

entityType.description: The type of the backup set.

errorCategory.description: Category of error for failed jobs.

extendedParams.description: Additional parameters required for job execution.

jobID.description: A unique identification number associated with the job.

primaryAuthEntityID.description: Primary authorization entity ID. The value is ID of your organization.

primaryAuthEntityType.description: Type of primary authorization entity ID. The value is "org".

productCustomerID.description: Customer ID specific to the product.

productID.description: Phoenix product ID. The value is 12289.

resourceID.description: The unique identifier of the Azure SQL resource.

resourceName.description: The name of the Azure SQL resource.

resourceType.description: The type of resource. The value corresponds to the entity type ID: 13 for Azure SQL Database Server, 15 for Azure SQL Managed Instance, and 17 for Azure SQL server on Azure VM.

retryEnabled.description: Indicates if retry is enabled. The value is "true" if retry is enabled.

retryWaitinterval.description: Retry interval in minutes before next retry attempt.

scheduleEventID.description: Schedule event ID for scheduled jobs.

secondaryAuthEntityID.description: Secondary authorization entity ID. The value is ID of your group.

secondaryAuthEntityType.description: Type of secondary authorization entity ID. The value is "group".

stateID.description: ID of the current state of the job.

stateLabel.description: Label of current state of the job.

targetID.description: Target entity ID for restore operations.

targetName.description: Target VM name for restore operations.

targetType.description: Target entity type for restore operations.

windowEndTS.description: Duration in seconds for which the backup job runs.

workloadName.description: Name of the workload. The value is "azuresql".

JobParamsAzureSQL.description: Specify job parameters needed for restoring snapshot.

snapshotState.description: Specify state of the snapshot. For example, 'hot', 'warm' or 'cold'.

rpState.description: Specify recovery point state. For example, 'hot', 'warm' or 'cold'.

newVmRegion.description: Specify the destination Azure region for VM restore.

AzureSQLParams.description: Specify Azure SQL specific parameters for database restore operations.

selectedDBNames.description: Specify mapping of source database names to target database objects for restore operation. For example "selectedDBNames": {"sourcedb": {"name": "targetdb", "type": "user"}}.

targetEntityID.description: Specify unique identifier of the target SQL Server instance where databases will be restored.

targetVMName.description: Specify name of the target virtual machine hosting the SQL Server instance.

targetLocationID.description: Specify identifier of the target Azure location/region for cross-region restore operations.

targetAccountID.description: Specify identifier of the target Azure account for cross-account restore operation.

targetConnectionID.description: Specify connection identifier for the target Azure environment/subscription.

pitTimestamp.description: Specify unix timestamp for point-in-time recovery to restore database to specific moment time.For example, '1704067200'.

snapshotIDs.description: Specify Array of snapshot identifiers for multi-snapshot restore operations.
